Flow.description: Screenflow to show a table of reconciliation records associated with an award that displays an individual record when selected with associated actions
Flow.label: GMS - Reconciliation Display

value.stringValue: [{"apiName":"Name","guid":"column-3718","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Reference","wrapText":true,"order":0,"label":"Funding Award Reconciliation Name","type":"text"},{"apiName":"Reconciliation_Period_Start__c","guid":"column-fd59","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Period Start","wrapText":true,"order":1,"label":"Reconciliation Period Start","type":"date-local"},{"apiName":"Reconciliation_Period_End__c","guid":"column-fb7a","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Period End","wrapText":true,"order":2,"label":"Reconciliation Period End","type":"date-local"},{"apiName":"Status__c","guid":"column-1979","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":3,"label":"Status","type":"text"},{"apiName":"Percentage_Transactions_Reconciled__c","guid":"column-6550","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"% Reviewed","wrapText":true,"order":4,"label":"Percentage Transactions Reconciled","type":"number"}]

fields.name: Transaction_List_URL
fields.fieldText: Transactions related to this report

fields.name: I_declare_that_this_reconciliation_is_now_complete
fields.fieldText: I declare that this reconciliation is now complete
